challenges.diagnosis: Category mismatch: DCP0606QTRY is an active DC-DC controller IC (QFN-11). Würth Elektronik's portfolio is strictly passive components, magnetics, connectors, and electromechanical parts. No active semiconductor ICs are manufactured.

confirmed.diagnosis: Category mismatch: DCP0606QTRY is an active DC-DC controller IC (QFN-11). Würth Elektronik's portfolio is strictly passive components, magnetics, connectors, and electromechanical parts. No active semiconductor ICs are manufactured.

objections: L1 (74477009): Saturation current (Isat) not verified against original XGL4030-471ME. Isat must be confirmed >= 1.2 × Ipeak to prevent core saturation under full load conditions.
warnings: C21 (860010273010): Package dimensions must be verified compatible with original D8L footprint and height constraints
L1 (74477009): Package footprint must be verified compatible with 4.0x4.0mm original
L3 (7443081030): Package footprint must be verified compatible with 3.0x3.0mm original
L3 (7443081030): Verify inductance value matches original 300nH despite DCR reduction from ~3.5mΩ to 0.29mΩ
review_verdicts.summary: Cross-reference incomplete: L1 substitute lacks verified saturation current rating, which is critical for inductor selection in power converters. Mechanical verification required for C21, L1, and L3 footprints.

warnings: L1 (74477009): Verify saturation current (Isat) meets or exceeds original XGL4030-471ME rating (~28A); verify 4.0x4.0mm footprint compatibility
L3 (7443081030): DCR of 0.29mΩ is 12× lower than original 3.5mΩ; verify substitute inductance is 300nH (0.3µH) not 10µH (103 coding), confirm Isat rating, and verify 3.0x3.0mm footprint
C21 (860010273010): Verify package dimensions (D8L footprint 7.3×4.3mm) align with original 6TAE330ML layout; substitute voltage rating is higher (10V vs 6.3V) which is acceptable
U1: No substitute available — ensure procurement strategy accounts for single-source controller IC
review_verdicts.summary: Cross-reference BOM is acceptable. All passive values match. C21 is upgraded (10V vs 6.3V). L1 and L3 require saturation current verification and mechanical footprint confirmation. L3 DCR discrepancy warrants inductance value verification to ensure 300nH specification is maintained.
